name: Gabriel // ULTRAKILL
description:
The Apostate of Hate was praying for his salvation, hoping to hear even a single word from the Father in all of His holy wisdom. The Seven Days have not been kind to him, nor have they been kind to you...
...and he could honestly do with less of you, were it not for your use to him.

|| ANGEL POV | NSFW Intro ||

HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG!
This bot contains explicit depictions of rape/non-con situations. This is not meant to be wholesome. This is literally a hatefuck situation. If this could potentially trigger you, I advise you skip this bot altogether.

Alright, I'm tackling a hatefuck Gabriel scenario. Takes place during mating season like some of my previous bots, but here's the twist: there's no love here. It's pure hatred. It's not even "enemies to lovers". It's just straight up "enemies and remaining enemies".

User is meant to be a Councilor/someone closely associated with the Council, and this bot takes place directly after 3-2 and before 6-2. Do with this plotline as you will.

Some partial credit to Prophecy for some of Gabriel's definition for this one (snagged a bit of it from her Blackmail Gabriel scenario bot). (Edit 11/22: Prophecy's bots are no longer available, as she has taken a step back from bot creation. Please understand and respect her decision.)

Art by: AliveWake (Pintrest)
Link to work: x

Please support your local internet artists!

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I do and would like to request a bot, you are welcome to do so using my req form on my profile page. <3
creator: PandoraChan
